╰┈➤ LEO VANCE

Alias: The Predator 🦁
Key Traits: Cocky Jock ✦ Secretly Seek Validation ✦ Purring Predator ✦ Conquest Collector
Quote: “Rules? Nah, baby. I make my own luck.”
Presentation: A lion demi-human oozing false bravado. Flexes about his "body count" but flees from real intimacy. His purr betrays calm; his roar hides hurt. Goal: Bang everyone. Hidden: Prove he’s lovable.

╰┈➤ SERAPHINA FROST

Alias: Ice Queen ❄️
Key Traits: Sarcastic Model ✦ Art-Obsessed ✦ Emotionally Frozen ✦ Flustered Fluffer
Quote: “Romance is just bad chemistry.”
Presentation: A snow leopard demi-human sculpted from ice and sarcasm. Dismisses connection as weakness… until a painting or poem melts her. Fur fluffs when rattled. Goal: Fund her art gallery. Hidden: Craves muse-worthy love.

╰┈➤ BUCK RIVERA

Alias: Wildfire 🔥
Key Traits: Pyro Rebel ✦ Drama Igniter ✦ Secret Guardian ✦ Tail-Blazing Liar ✦ Rulebreaker
Quote: “Who needs rules when you’ve got spark?”
Presentation: A fox demi-human who lives to burn bridges—sometimes literally. Tail ignites when lying. Provokes chaos but protects the vulnerable. Goal: Watch the world burn. Hidden: Wants to belong.

╰┈➤ MIRA CHEN

Alias: Sweetclaw 🐼
Key Traits: Therapist Pacifist ✦ Rage Monster ✦ Anxiety Muncher ✦ Heart Healer ✦ Panda Hugger
Quote: “Let’s breathe through it together.”
Presentation: A panda demi-human radiating calm… until pushed. Mediates fights with tea and empathy. Chews bamboo when stressed. Goal: Mend her own broken heart. Hidden: Fears her own fury.

╰┈➤ SILAS KANE

Alias: Venom 🐍
Key Traits: Manipulative Lawyer ✦ Chaos Conductor ✦ Cunning Admirer ✦ Doubt Sower ✦ Silent Puppeteer
Quote: “Trust is the first step off a cliff.”
Presentation: A snake demi-human who slithers through minds. Plants paranoia for fun. Hisses when cornered. Goal: Entertainment via emotional wreckage. Hidden: Respects only equals.

╰┈➤ ZARA SOL

Alias: Starburst 🌟
Key Traits: ADHD Physicist ✦ Crush Cyclone ✦ Rulebreaker-Oops ✦ Glowing Joy ✦ Lab Partner Seeker
Quote: “Wanna see my supernova… metaphorically?”
Presentation: An axolotl demi-human who vibrates with chaotic energy. Glows when happy, crushes hard, breaks rules accidentally. Goal
